at0000.1.description: قائمة من المشكلات الصحية الحالية لهذا الشخص.
A persistent and managed list of any combination of diagnoses, problems and/or procedures that may influence clinical decision-making and care provision for the subject of care.
확인된 진단이나 환자가 겪는 문제 또는 임상의사결정과 환자진료에 영향을 줄 수 있는 이전에 시행된 처치에 대한 영구적으로 관리되는 목록.

Uma lista permanente e gerenciável de quaisquer combinações de diagnósticos, problemas e/ou procedimentos que possam influenciar o processo de tomada de decisão clínica e provisão de cuidado ao indivíduo.

Eine beständige und gepflegte Liste jeder Kombination von Diagnosen, Problemen und/oder Verfahren, die sich auf die klinische Entscheidungsfindung und die Versorgung des Pflegebedürftigen auswirken können.

Een blijvende en beheerde lijst vast te leggen van geïdentificeerde diagnoses, problemen ervaren door het individu, of in het verleden uitgevoerde procedures, die van invloed kunnen zijn op klinische beslissingen en levering van zorg.
由那些可能影响照护服务对象的临床决策和照护服务提供过程的诊断、问题和/或操作[项目]的任意组合所构成的持续存在且受到管控的清单。

Una lista persistente y gestionable que incluye cualquier combinación de diagnósticos, problemas y/o procedimientos que pueden influir en la toma de decisiones clínicas y prestación de cuidados en un paciente sujeto de la asistencia.

Ένας επίμονος και διαχειριζόμενος κατάλογος οποιουδήποτε συνδυασμού διαγνώσεων, προβλημάτων ή / και διαδικασιών που μπορεί να επηρεάσουν τη λήψη κλινικών αποφάσεων και την παροχή φροντίδας για το υποκείμενο της φροντίδας.
A generic section header which should be renamed in a template to suit a specific clinical context.

at0078.2.description: Causa, conjunto de causas o manera de causar el problema o diagnóstico.
at0078.2.comment: También denominada "etiología". Siempre que sea posible, es preferible codificar con una terminología.

at0078.2.description: *A cause, set of causes, or manner of causation of the problem or diagnosis.(en)
at0078.2.comment: *Also known as 'aetiology' or 'etiology'. Coding with an external terminology is preferred, where possible.(en)

at0078.2.description: Die Ursache, eine Reihe von Ursachen oder eine Art und Weise der Verursachung des Problems oder der Diagnose.
at0078.2.comment: Auch bekannt als „Ätiologie“. Die Codierung mit einer externen Terminologie wird nach Möglichkeit bevorzugt.

at0078.1.description: A cause, set of causes, or manner of causation of the problem or diagnosis.
at0078.1.comment: Also known as 'aetiology' or 'etiology'. Coding with an external terminology is preferred, where possible.

at0078.2.description: *A cause, set of causes, or manner of causation of the problem or diagnosis.(en)
at0078.2.comment: *Also known as 'aetiology' or 'etiology'. Coding with an external terminology is preferred, where possible.(en)

at0078.2.description: *A cause, set of causes, or manner of causation of the problem or diagnosis.(en)
at0078.2.comment: *Also known as 'aetiology' or 'etiology'. Coding with an external terminology is preferred, where possible.(en)

at0078.2.description: En årsak, kjede av årsaker til, eller hendelsesforløp forut for problemet eller diagnosen.
at0078.2.comment: Også kjent som 'etiologi'. Det anbefales å kode "Årsak" med en ekstern terminologi dersom det er mulig.

at0078.2.description: En eller flera orsaker till problemet eller diagnosen, eller dess uppkomstsätt
at0078.2.comment: Även känt som "etiologi". Om möjligt, koda med en terminologi.

at0078.2.description: *A cause, set of causes, or manner of causation of the problem or diagnosis.(en)
at0078.2.comment: *Also known as 'aetiology' or 'etiology'. Coding with an external terminology is preferred, where possible.(en)

at0078.2.description: *A cause, set of causes, or manner of causation of the problem or diagnosis.(en)
at0078.2.comment: *Also known as 'aetiology' or 'etiology'. Coding with an external terminology is preferred, where possible.(en)

at0078.2.description: *A cause, set of causes, or manner of causation of the problem or diagnosis.(en)
at0078.2.comment: *Also known as 'aetiology' or 'etiology'. Coding with an external terminology is preferred, where possible.(en)

at0078.2.description: *A cause, set of causes, or manner of causation of the problem or diagnosis.(en)
at0078.2.comment: *Also known as 'aetiology' or 'etiology'. Coding with an external terminology is preferred, where possible.(en)

at0078.2.description: *A cause, set of causes, or manner of causation of the problem or diagnosis.(en)
at0078.2.comment: *Also known as 'aetiology' or 'etiology'. Coding with an external terminology is preferred, where possible.(en)

at0078.2.description: Una causa, conjunt de causes o el mecanisme causal del problema o diagnòstic.
at0078.2.comment: També conegut com a «etiologia». Es recomana programar amb una terminologia si és possible.

at0078.2.description: 问题或诊断的原因、原因集合（成套/成组的原因）或因果作用方式（manner of causation）。
at0078.2.comment: 又称为“病因”（aetiology/etiology）。尽可能首选采用外部术语标准来进行编码。

at0077.1.comment: Definitions of acute vs chronic will differ for each diagnosis.
